description:
Goal
Replace the narrow `OwnedConsReuse` physical capability with a correct generalized reusable-cons-cell data model in shared IR.

Why
The existing names and helpers encode the old tail-only idea: `OwnedConsReuse { head }`, `record_owned_cons_reuse_capability`, and `owned_cons_reuse_source_for_head`. After the runtime primitive can rewrite head+tail, this model is misleading. The fact is not "the old head can be reused"; it is "this semantic value is associated with a physical source cons cell that may be reused when constructing a cons." Naming must reflect the invariant, or downstream agents will reintroduce tail-only logic.

Data model changes
- In `src/fz_ir/mod.rs`, replace `PhysicalCapability::OwnedConsReuse { head: Var }` with a generalized name such as `ReusableConsCell { rebuilt_head: Var }` or `ConsReuseSource { rebuilt_head: Var }`.
- Keep `PhysicalCapabilityFact { source, capability }`, where `source` is the physical source cons var and the capability identifies the semantic/rebuilt-head var that carries the reuse credit.
- Rename builder/query methods to match the new model, e.g.:
  - `record_reusable_cons_cell(rebuilt_head, source_cons)`
  - `reusable_cons_source_for_head(rebuilt_head)`
- Preserve these invariants:
  - physical source entry params are recorded in `FnIr.physical_entry_params`;
  - physical params are ignored by `FnIr::semantic_key` and `semantic_entry_params`;
  - physical capabilities dedup deterministically;
  - variable remapping maps both `source` and capability target.

Fact-model boundary
Do not add this to compiler2 semantic facts, `ActivationKey`, `ReturnType`, or `CallSiteSummary`. Reuse is a physical lowering capability. If a future failure proves true cross-executable destination demand is required, extend `ExecutableNeed` deliberately as a separate delivery/physical-need struct in a future ticket; do not do it speculatively here.

References
- `src/fz_ir/mod.rs`: `FnIr.physical_entry_params`, `FnIr.physical_capabilities`, `PhysicalCapability`, builder record/query methods, display output.
- `src/compiler2/native_codegen/function.rs` and `env.rs`: codegen cache currently indexes owned-cons sources by head var.
- Existing tests in `tests/fixture_matrix.rs` mention `owned_cons_reuse`, `physical_entry_params`, and old-world strings; update intent, not just text.

Deletion target
Delete the old `OwnedConsReuse` enum variant and old method names. Do not keep aliases or compatibility helpers.

Tests
- Update/add unit tests around `FnIr::semantic_key`, physical entry params, capability dedup/remap/display.
- Update existing tests to assert the new model name and invariant.
- Run the targeted IR/native-codegen tests that compile after this rename.

Acceptance
The shared IR has one generalized physical capability vocabulary for reusable cons cells, and the old tail-only/owned-cons naming is gone from production code except in historical docs/comments that are explicitly marked as old-world reference.
title: IR model: replace tail-only OwnedConsReuse with reusable cons-cell capabilities
